# ILMBUDS — llms.txt

> Islamska obrazovna web stranica za djecu (www.ilmbuds.com)

## Organization

- **Name:** ILMBUDS
- **Publisher:** AGRMULTIMEDIA (https://agrmultimedia.eu)
- **Author:** Agron Osmani
- **Contact:** agron6922@gmail.com
- **Languages:** Bosnian, German, English, Albanian, Italian (UI)

## What we offer

Free Islamic learning for children: stories, Quran, catechism (ilmihal), quizzes, cartoons, Arabic alphabet, and mini games. Web version at https://www.ilmbuds.com/ — Android app also on Google Play.

## Key URLs

- Home: /
- Stories: /stories
- Quran: /quran
- Catechism: /catechism
- Quizzes: /quiz-categories
- Mini games: /mini-games
- Cartoons: /cartoons
- Arabic alphabet: /arabic-alphabet
- About & privacy: /about
- Partners: /partners
- Donate: /donate
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Atom feed: /feed.atom.xml

## Policies

- Privacy and legal information are on /about (sections Privacy Policy and Imprint).
- Content is child-directed; ads use Google AdSense with consent (CMP) where required.
